sql: SELECT 'funnel' AS panel, wc.source AS a, COUNT(*) AS b, SUM(CASE WHEN ws.address IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS c, SUM(CASE WHEN wc.last_refreshed IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS d, SUM(CASE WHEN wc.priority IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS e, NULL AS f, NULL AS g FROM wallet_candidates wc LEFT JOIN wallet_scores ws ON ws.address = wc.address GROUP BY wc.source UNION ALL SELECT 'srcsmart', wc.source, ws.address, ROUND(ws.total_realized_sol_drop_top3,2), ROUND(COALESCE(ws.monthly_run_rate_sol,0),2), ROUND(COALESCE(ws.avg_hold_sec,0)), ROUND((strftime('%s','now') - COALESCE(ws.last_active, 0))/86400.0, 1), ws.n_round_trips FROM wallet_scores ws JOIN wallet_candidates wc ON wc.address = ws.address WHERE wc.source IN ('live_tape','external','winner_sniper') AND ws.total_realized_sol_drop_top3 > 0 AND COALESCE(ws.avg_hold_sec,0) >= 30 AND COALESCE(ws.win_rate,1) <= 0.95 AND COALESCE(json_extract(ws.venues_json,'$.pumpswap'),0)*1.0/NULLIF((SELECT SUM(value) FROM json_each(ws.venues_json)),0) >= 0.5 UNION ALL SELECT 'sniper21', t.address, t.appearances, t.winner_hits, COALESCE(wc.source,'NONE'), CASE WHEN ws.address IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, ROUND(COALESCE(ws.total_realized_sol_drop_top3,-999),2), ROUND(t.score,2) FROM winner_sniper_tally t LEFT JOIN wallet_candidates wc ON wc.address = t.address LEFT JOIN wallet_scores ws ON ws.address = t.address WHERE t.winner_hits >= 2 UNION ALL SELECT 'wsc', wc.address, wc.priority, wc.first_seen, COALESCE(wc.last_refreshed,0), COALESCE(ws.n_round_trips,-1), ROUND(COALESCE(ws.total_realized_sol,-999),2), ROUND(COALESCE(ws.total_realized_sol_drop_top3,-999),2) FROM wallet_candidates wc LEFT JOIN wallet_scores ws ON ws.address = wc.address WHERE wc.source = 'winner_sniper' ORDER BY panel, a
